title: PPM (Political Psychology Application and Research Center) Announcements

PPM (Political Psychology Application and Research Center) Announcements

Beyond the Lines Program

Every Thursday at 15:00, PPM Deputy Director Assoc. Prof. Dr. Feride Zeynep GÜDER, together with the guests of the "Beyond the Lines" Program, is broadcast live on ÜÜ TV.
